revision.text: {{{1|}}}

{{{1|}}}
---- This template is an alternative to 
 tags. The difference is that it allows line-breaks and dissallows the text to overflow the page.

Due to limitations, if the parameter contains any HTML or other Wikimarkup, it will be rendered as such. Thus if a parameter might contain any Wikitext, enclose it manually in  tags.

See the [[Template talk:Pre|Talk page]] for examples of use and further information.

{{{1|}}}
---- This template is an alternative to 
 tags. The difference is that it allows line-breaks and dissallows the text to overflow the page.

Due to limitations, if the parameter contains any HTML or other Wikimarkup, it will be rendered as such. Thus if a parameter might contain any Wikitext, enclose it manually in  tags.

See the [[Template talk:Pre|Talk page]] for examples of use and further information.

{{{1|}}}
---- This template is an alternative to 
 tags. The difference is that it allows line-breaks and dissallows the text to overflow the page.

Due to limitations, if the parameter contains any HTML or other Wikimarkup, it will be rendered as such. Thus if a parameter might contain any Wikitext, enclose it manually in  tags.

See the [[Template talk:Pre|Talk page]] for examples of use and further information.

[[Category:Wikipedia special effects templates|Pre]]

{{{1|}}}
---- This template is an alternative to 
 tags. The difference is that it allows line-breaks and dissallows the text to overflow the page.

Due to limitations, if the parameter contains any HTML or other Wikimarkup, it will be rendered as such. Thus if a parameter might contain any Wikitext, enclose it manually in  tags.

See the [[Template talk:Pre|Talk page]] for examples of use and further information.

[[Category:Wikipedia special effects templates|Pre]]

{{{1|}}}
---- This template is an alternative to 
 tags. The difference is that it allows line-breaks and dissallows the text to overflow the page.

Due to limitations, if the parameter contains any HTML or other Wikimarkup, it will be rendered as such. Thus if a parameter might contain any Wikitext, enclose it manually in  tags.

See the [[Template talk:Pre|Talk page]] for examples of use and further information.

[[Category:Wikipedia special effects templates|Pre]]

{{{1|}}}
---- This template is an alternative to 
 tags. The difference is that it allows line-breaks and dissallows the text to overflow the page.

Due to limitations, if the parameter contains any HTML or other Wikimarkup, it will be rendered as such. Thus if a parameter might contain any Wikitext, enclose it manually in  tags.

See the [[Template talk:Pre|Talk page]] for examples of use and further information.

[[Category:Wikipedia special effects templates|Pre]]

{{{1|}}}
---- This template is an alternative to 
 tags. The difference is that it allows line-breaks and dissallows the text to overflow the page.

Due to limitations, if the parameter contains any HTML or other Wikimarkup, it will be rendered as such. Thus if a parameter might contain any Wikitext, enclose it manually in  tags.

See the [[Template talk:Pre|Talk page]] for examples of use and further information.

[[Category:Wikipedia special effects templates|Pre]]

revision.comment: add autohandling for params in params, + formating
revision.text:
[[Template:Pre|pre]]
{{#if:{{{1|}}}|{{{1}}}|Pre-formatted text looks like this.}}{{#if:{{{2|}}}|{{!}}{{{2}}}|}}{{#if:{{{3|}}}|{{!}}{{{3}}}|}}{{#if:{{{4|}}}|{{!}}{{{4}}}|}}{{#if:{{{5|}}}|{{!}}{{{5}}}|}}{{#if:{{{6|}}}|{{!}}{{{6}}}|}}{{#if:{{{7|}}}|{{!}}{{{7}}}|}}{{#if:{{{8|}}}|{{!}}{{{8}}}|}}{{#if:{{{9|}}}|{{!}}{{{9}}}|}}{{#if:{{{10|}}}|{{!}}{{{10}}}|}}{{#if:{{{11|}}}|{{!}}{{{11}}}|}}{{#if:{{{12|}}}|{{!}}{{{12}}}|}}{{#if:{{{13|}}}|{{!}}{{{13}}}|}}{{#if:{{{14|}}}|{{!}}{{{14}}}|}}{{#if:{{{15|}}}|{{!}}{{{15}}}|}}{{#if:{{{16|}}}|{{!}}{{{16}}}|}}{{#if:{{{17|}}}|{{!}}{{{17}}}|}}{{#if:{{{18|}}}|{{!}}{{{18}}}|}}{{#if:{{{19|}}}|{{!}}{{{19}}}|}}
---- This template mimics the appearance of 
 tags. Main differences include:
*It allows mid-line-breaks
*Dissallows the text to overflow the page.
*Due to limitations, if the parameter contains any HTML or other Wikimarkup, it will be rendered as such. Thus if a parameter might contain any Wikitext, enclose it manually in  tags.

See the [[Template talk:Pre|Talk page]] for examples of use and further information.

[[Category:Wikipedia special effects templates|Pre]]

revision.comment: changed font to 'monospace' (the user-defined fixed-width browser default)
revision.text:
[[Template:Pre|pre]]
{{#if:{{{1|}}}|{{{1}}}|Pre-formatted text looks like this.}}{{#if:{{{2|}}}|{{!}}{{{2}}}|}}{{#if:{{{3|}}}|{{!}}{{{3}}}|}}{{#if:{{{4|}}}|{{!}}{{{4}}}|}}{{#if:{{{5|}}}|{{!}}{{{5}}}|}}{{#if:{{{6|}}}|{{!}}{{{6}}}|}}{{#if:{{{7|}}}|{{!}}{{{7}}}|}}{{#if:{{{8|}}}|{{!}}{{{8}}}|}}{{#if:{{{9|}}}|{{!}}{{{9}}}|}}{{#if:{{{10|}}}|{{!}}{{{10}}}|}}{{#if:{{{11|}}}|{{!}}{{{11}}}|}}{{#if:{{{12|}}}|{{!}}{{{12}}}|}}{{#if:{{{13|}}}|{{!}}{{{13}}}|}}{{#if:{{{14|}}}|{{!}}{{{14}}}|}}{{#if:{{{15|}}}|{{!}}{{{15}}}|}}{{#if:{{{16|}}}|{{!}}{{{16}}}|}}{{#if:{{{17|}}}|{{!}}{{{17}}}|}}{{#if:{{{18|}}}|{{!}}{{{18}}}|}}{{#if:{{{19|}}}|{{!}}{{{19}}}|}}
---- This template mimics the appearance of 
 tags. Main differences include:
*It allows mid-line-breaks
*Dissallows the text to overflow the page.
*Due to limitations, if the parameter contains any HTML or other Wikimarkup, it will be rendered as such. Thus if a parameter might contain any Wikitext, enclose it manually in  tags.

See the [[Template talk:Pre|Talk page]] for examples of use and further information.

[[Category:Wikipedia special effects templates|Pre]]

[[Template:Pre|pre]]
{{#if:{{{1|}}}|{{{1}}}|Pre-formatted text looks like this.}}{{#if:{{{2|}}}|{{!}}{{{2}}}|}}{{#if:{{{3|}}}|{{!}}{{{3}}}|}}{{#if:{{{4|}}}|{{!}}{{{4}}}|}}{{#if:{{{5|}}}|{{!}}{{{5}}}|}}{{#if:{{{6|}}}|{{!}}{{{6}}}|}}{{#if:{{{7|}}}|{{!}}{{{7}}}|}}{{#if:{{{8|}}}|{{!}}{{{8}}}|}}{{#if:{{{9|}}}|{{!}}{{{9}}}|}}{{#if:{{{10|}}}|{{!}}{{{10}}}|}}{{#if:{{{11|}}}|{{!}}{{{11}}}|}}{{#if:{{{12|}}}|{{!}}{{{12}}}|}}{{#if:{{{13|}}}|{{!}}{{{13}}}|}}{{#if:{{{14|}}}|{{!}}{{{14}}}|}}{{#if:{{{15|}}}|{{!}}{{{15}}}|}}{{#if:{{{16|}}}|{{!}}{{{16}}}|}}{{#if:{{{17|}}}|{{!}}{{{17}}}|}}{{#if:{{{18|}}}|{{!}}{{{18}}}|}}{{#if:{{{19|}}}|{{!}}{{{19}}}|}}
---- This template mimics the appearance of 
 tags. Main differences include:
*It allows mid-line-breaks
*Dissallows the text to overflow the page.
*Due to limitations, if the parameter contains any HTML or other Wikimarkup, it will be rendered as such. Thus if a parameter might contain any Wikitext, enclose it manually in  tags.

See the [[Template talk:Pre|Talk page]] for examples of use and further information.


[[Category:Formatting templates|{{PAGENAME}}]]

revision.comment: " {{#ifeq:{{SUBPAGENAME}} | sandbox " code, {{pp-semi-protected| small=yes | reason=No need for such template to be anon-editable. }}, and [[Category:Templates using ParserFunctions]]
revision.text:
[[Template:Pre|pre]]
{{#if:{{{1|}}}|{{{1}}}|Pre-formatted text
looks like this.}}{{#if:{{{2|}}}|{{!}}{{{2}}}|}}{{#if:{{{3|}}}|{{!}}{{{3}}}|}}{{#if:{{{4|}}}|{{!}}{{{4}}}|}}{{#if:{{{5|}}}|{{!}}{{{5}}}|}}{{#if:{{{6|}}}|{{!}}{{{6}}}|}}{{#if:{{{7|}}}|{{!}}{{{7}}}|}}{{#if:{{{8|}}}|{{!}}{{{8}}}|}}{{#if:{{{9|}}}|{{!}}{{{9}}}|}}{{#if:{{{10|}}}|{{!}}{{{10}}}|}}{{#if:{{{11|}}}|{{!}}{{{11}}}|}}{{#if:{{{12|}}}|{{!}}{{{12}}}|}}{{#if:{{{13|}}}|{{!}}{{{13}}}|}}{{#if:{{{14|}}}|{{!}}{{{14}}}|}}{{#if:{{{15|}}}|{{!}}{{{15}}}|}}{{#if:{{{16|}}}|{{!}}{{{16}}}|}}{{#if:{{{17|}}}|{{!}}{{{17}}}|}}{{#if:{{{18|}}}|{{!}}{{{18}}}|}}{{#if:{{{19|}}}|{{!}}{{{19}}}|}}
==Usage== 

{{Pre|
Pre-formatted text
looks like this.
}}
This template mimics the appearance of 
 tags. Main differences include:
*It allows mid-line-breaks
*Dissallows the text to overflow the page.
*Due to limitations, if the parameter contains any HTML or other Wikimarkup, it will be rendered as such. Thus if a parameter might contain any Wikitext, enclose it manually in  tags.

See the [[Template talk:Pre|Talk page]] for examples of use and further information.

{{pp-semi-protected| small=yes | reason=No need for such template to be anon-editable. }}
{{#ifeq:{{SUBPAGENAME}} | sandbox
 | {{Template sandbox notice}}
 
}}

[[Category:Formatting templates|{{PAGENAME}}]]
[[Category:Templates using ParserFunctions|{{PAGENAME}}]]

revision.comment: moved doc and cats to /doc, remplaced with {{Template doc}}
revision.text:
[[Template:Pre|pre]]
{{#if:{{{1|}}}|{{{1}}}|Pre-formatted text
looks like this.}}{{#if:{{{2|}}}|{{!}}{{{2}}}|}}{{#if:{{{3|}}}|{{!}}{{{3}}}|}}{{#if:{{{4|}}}|{{!}}{{{4}}}|}}{{#if:{{{5|}}}|{{!}}{{{5}}}|}}{{#if:{{{6|}}}|{{!}}{{{6}}}|}}{{#if:{{{7|}}}|{{!}}{{{7}}}|}}{{#if:{{{8|}}}|{{!}}{{{8}}}|}}{{#if:{{{9|}}}|{{!}}{{{9}}}|}}{{#if:{{{10|}}}|{{!}}{{{10}}}|}}{{#if:{{{11|}}}|{{!}}{{{11}}}|}}{{#if:{{{12|}}}|{{!}}{{{12}}}|}}{{#if:{{{13|}}}|{{!}}{{{13}}}|}}{{#if:{{{14|}}}|{{!}}{{{14}}}|}}{{#if:{{{15|}}}|{{!}}{{{15}}}|}}{{#if:{{{16|}}}|{{!}}{{{16}}}|}}{{#if:{{{17|}}}|{{!}}{{{17}}}|}}{{#if:{{{18|}}}|{{!}}{{{18}}}|}}{{#if:{{{19|}}}|{{!}}{{{19}}}|}}
{{pp-semi-protected| small=yes | reason=No need for such template to be anon-editable. }} {{#ifeq:{{SUBPAGENAME}} | sandbox | {{Template sandbox notice}} | {{Template doc}} }}

revision.comment: after sandbox/testcases verification, moved {{Template sandbox notice}} to top <noinclude> block
revision.text:
{{#ifeq:{{SUBPAGENAME}}|sandbox|{{Template sandbox notice}} }}
[[Template:Pre|pre]]
{{#if:{{{1|}}}|{{{1}}}|Pre-formatted text
looks like this.}}{{#if:{{{2|}}}|{{!}}{{{2}}}|}}{{#if:{{{3|}}}|{{!}}{{{3}}}|}}{{#if:{{{4|}}}|{{!}}{{{4}}}|}}{{#if:{{{5|}}}|{{!}}{{{5}}}|}}{{#if:{{{6|}}}|{{!}}{{{6}}}|}}{{#if:{{{7|}}}|{{!}}{{{7}}}|}}{{#if:{{{8|}}}|{{!}}{{{8}}}|}}{{#if:{{{9|}}}|{{!}}{{{9}}}|}}{{#if:{{{10|}}}|{{!}}{{{10}}}|}}{{#if:{{{11|}}}|{{!}}{{{11}}}|}}{{#if:{{{12|}}}|{{!}}{{{12}}}|}}{{#if:{{{13|}}}|{{!}}{{{13}}}|}}{{#if:{{{14|}}}|{{!}}{{{14}}}|}}{{#if:{{{15|}}}|{{!}}{{{15}}}|}}{{#if:{{{16|}}}|{{!}}{{{16}}}|}}{{#if:{{{17|}}}|{{!}}{{{17}}}|}}{{#if:{{{18|}}}|{{!}}{{{18}}}|}}{{#if:{{{19|}}}|{{!}}{{{19}}}|}}
{{pp-semi-protected| small=yes | reason=No need for such template to be anon-editable. }} {{#ifeq:{{SUBPAGENAME}}|sandbox||{{Template doc}} }}

revision.comment: after sandbox tests, replaced hardcoded " font-family: monospace " with internal <TT> to get the same look than the official <PRE>, <TT> or <CODE>, i.e. the font the user selected
revision.text:
{{#ifeq:{{SUBPAGENAME}}|sandbox|{{Template sandbox notice}} }}
[[Template:Pre|pre]]
{{#if:{{{1|}}}|{{{1}}}|Pre-formatted text
looks like this.}}{{#if:{{{2|}}}|{{!}}{{{2}}}|}}{{#if:{{{3|}}}|{{!}}{{{3}}}|}}{{#if:{{{4|}}}|{{!}}{{{4}}}|}}{{#if:{{{5|}}}|{{!}}{{{5}}}|}}{{#if:{{{6|}}}|{{!}}{{{6}}}|}}{{#if:{{{7|}}}|{{!}}{{{7}}}|}}{{#if:{{{8|}}}|{{!}}{{{8}}}|}}{{#if:{{{9|}}}|{{!}}{{{9}}}|}}{{#if:{{{10|}}}|{{!}}{{{10}}}|}}{{#if:{{{11|}}}|{{!}}{{{11}}}|}}{{#if:{{{12|}}}|{{!}}{{{12}}}|}}{{#if:{{{13|}}}|{{!}}{{{13}}}|}}{{#if:{{{14|}}}|{{!}}{{{14}}}|}}{{#if:{{{15|}}}|{{!}}{{{15}}}|}}{{#if:{{{16|}}}|{{!}}{{{16}}}|}}{{#if:{{{17|}}}|{{!}}{{{17}}}|}}{{#if:{{{18|}}}|{{!}}{{{18}}}|}}{{#if:{{{19|}}}|{{!}}{{{19}}}|}}
{{pp-semi-protected| small=yes | reason=No need for such template to be anon-editable. }} {{#ifeq:{{SUBPAGENAME}}|sandbox||{{Template doc}} }}

revision.comment: updated self-included example in line with doc
revision.text:
{{#ifeq:{{SUBPAGENAME}}|sandbox|{{Template sandbox notice}} }}
[[Template:Pre|pre]]
{{#if:{{{1|}}}|{{{1}}}|

This Pre-format

can look

like this.

}}{{#if:{{{2|}}}|{{!}}{{{2}}}|}}{{#if:{{{3|}}}|{{!}}{{{3}}}|}}{{#if:{{{4|}}}|{{!}}{{{4}}}|}}{{#if:{{{5|}}}|{{!}}{{{5}}}|}}{{#if:{{{6|}}}|{{!}}{{{6}}}|}}{{#if:{{{7|}}}|{{!}}{{{7}}}|}}{{#if:{{{8|}}}|{{!}}{{{8}}}|}}{{#if:{{{9|}}}|{{!}}{{{9}}}|}}{{#if:{{{10|}}}|{{!}}{{{10}}}|}}{{#if:{{{11|}}}|{{!}}{{{11}}}|}}{{#if:{{{12|}}}|{{!}}{{{12}}}|}}{{#if:{{{13|}}}|{{!}}{{{13}}}|}}{{#if:{{{14|}}}|{{!}}{{{14}}}|}}{{#if:{{{15|}}}|{{!}}{{{15}}}|}}{{#if:{{{16|}}}|{{!}}{{{16}}}|}}{{#if:{{{17|}}}|{{!}}{{{17}}}|}}{{#if:{{{18|}}}|{{!}}{{{18}}}|}}{{#if:{{{19|}}}|{{!}}{{{19}}}|}}
{{pp-semi-protected| small=yes | reason=No need for such template to be anon-editable. }} {{#ifeq:{{SUBPAGENAME}}|sandbox||{{Template doc}} }}

revision.comment: made then-ELSE more visible than with ||
revision.text:
{{#ifeq:{{SUBPAGENAME}}|sandbox|{{Template sandbox notice}} }}
[[Template:Pre|pre]]
{{#if:{{{1|}}}|{{{1}}}|

This Pre-format

can look

like this.

}}{{#if:{{{2|}}}|{{!}}{{{2}}}|}}{{#if:{{{3|}}}|{{!}}{{{3}}}|}}{{#if:{{{4|}}}|{{!}}{{{4}}}|}}{{#if:{{{5|}}}|{{!}}{{{5}}}|}}{{#if:{{{6|}}}|{{!}}{{{6}}}|}}{{#if:{{{7|}}}|{{!}}{{{7}}}|}}{{#if:{{{8|}}}|{{!}}{{{8}}}|}}{{#if:{{{9|}}}|{{!}}{{{9}}}|}}{{#if:{{{10|}}}|{{!}}{{{10}}}|}}{{#if:{{{11|}}}|{{!}}{{{11}}}|}}{{#if:{{{12|}}}|{{!}}{{{12}}}|}}{{#if:{{{13|}}}|{{!}}{{{13}}}|}}{{#if:{{{14|}}}|{{!}}{{{14}}}|}}{{#if:{{{15|}}}|{{!}}{{{15}}}|}}{{#if:{{{16|}}}|{{!}}{{{16}}}|}}{{#if:{{{17|}}}|{{!}}{{{17}}}|}}{{#if:{{{18|}}}|{{!}}{{{18}}}|}}{{#if:{{{19|}}}|{{!}}{{{19}}}|}}
{{pp-semi-protected| small=yes | reason=No need for such template to be anon-editable. }} {{#ifeq:{{SUBPAGENAME}}|sandbox||{{Template doc}} }}

revision.comment: more secure like this, works with templates starting with a table
revision.text:
{{#ifeq:{{SUBPAGENAME}}|sandbox|{{Template sandbox notice}} }}
[[Template:Pre|pre]]
{{#if:{{{1|}}}|{{{1}}}|

This Pre-format

can look

like this.

}}{{#if:{{{2|}}}|{{!}}{{{2}}}|}}{{#if:{{{3|}}}|{{!}}{{{3}}}|}}{{#if:{{{4|}}}|{{!}}{{{4}}}|}}{{#if:{{{5|}}}|{{!}}{{{5}}}|}}{{#if:{{{6|}}}|{{!}}{{{6}}}|}}{{#if:{{{7|}}}|{{!}}{{{7}}}|}}{{#if:{{{8|}}}|{{!}}{{{8}}}|}}{{#if:{{{9|}}}|{{!}}{{{9}}}|}}{{#if:{{{10|}}}|{{!}}{{{10}}}|}}{{#if:{{{11|}}}|{{!}}{{{11}}}|}}{{#if:{{{12|}}}|{{!}}{{{12}}}|}}{{#if:{{{13|}}}|{{!}}{{{13}}}|}}{{#if:{{{14|}}}|{{!}}{{{14}}}|}}{{#if:{{{15|}}}|{{!}}{{{15}}}|}}{{#if:{{{16|}}}|{{!}}{{{16}}}|}}{{#if:{{{17|}}}|{{!}}{{{17}}}|}}{{#if:{{{18|}}}|{{!}}{{{18}}}|}}{{#if:{{{19|}}}|{{!}}{{{19}}}|}}
{{pp-semi-protected| small=yes | reason=No need for such template to be anon-editable. }} {{#ifeq:{{SUBPAGENAME}}|sandbox||{{Template doc}} }}

{{#ifeq:{{SUBPAGENAME}}|sandbox|{{Template sandbox notice}} }}
[[Template:Pre|pre]]
{{#if:{{{1|}}}|{{{1}}}|

This Pre-format

can look

like this.

}}{{#if:{{{2|}}}|{{!}}{{{2}}}|}}{{#if:{{{3|}}}|{{!}}{{{3}}}|}}{{#if:{{{4|}}}|{{!}}{{{4}}}|}}{{#if:{{{5|}}}|{{!}}{{{5}}}|}}{{#if:{{{6|}}}|{{!}}{{{6}}}|}}{{#if:{{{7|}}}|{{!}}{{{7}}}|}}{{#if:{{{8|}}}|{{!}}{{{8}}}|}}{{#if:{{{9|}}}|{{!}}{{{9}}}|}}{{#if:{{{10|}}}|{{!}}{{{10}}}|}}{{#if:{{{11|}}}|{{!}}{{{11}}}|}}{{#if:{{{12|}}}|{{!}}{{{12}}}|}}{{#if:{{{13|}}}|{{!}}{{{13}}}|}}{{#if:{{{14|}}}|{{!}}{{{14}}}|}}{{#if:{{{15|}}}|{{!}}{{{15}}}|}}{{#if:{{{16|}}}|{{!}}{{{16}}}|}}{{#if:{{{17|}}}|{{!}}{{{17}}}|}}{{#if:{{{18|}}}|{{!}}{{{18}}}|}}{{#if:{{{19|}}}|{{!}}{{{19}}}|}}
{{pp-semi-protected| small=yes | reason=No need for such template to be anon-editable. }} {{#ifeq:{{SUBPAGENAME}}|sandbox||{{Documentation, template}} }}

revision.comment: Bot: Removing out-dated semi - protection template
Adopt new border style, remove top link (unreadable) and redundant code.
Added one more available raw pipe to make it to 20.
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"
Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23530060143|commit triggered pipeline]]
Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24957526818|time triggered pipeline]]
